Off Calendar Dec-08-2021 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Nov-10-2021 Continued To Dec-08-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Thomas DiPaolo, via ZOOM, for Andre Huey, Executor.

Mr. DiPaolo reports that a petition is prepared and has been sent to his client for signature. Mr. DiPaolo also advises that he expects to file a waiver. The court confirms with Mr. DiPaolo that his client is no longer in custody.

The Status in Close of Estate is continued to Dec-08-2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Sep-15-2021 Continued To Nov-10-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Thomas DiPaolo, via ZOOM, for Andrew Huey, Personal Representative.

Mr. DiPaolo reports that he should have a Petition for Final Distribution filed within the next few weeks.

The Status on Close of Estate is continued to Nov-10-2021 at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Jul-19-2021 Continued To Aug-18-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Apr-26-2021 Continued To Jul-19-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Thomas DiPaolo, via ZOOM, counsel for Andrew Huey, Petitioner.

At the outset, the court questions Mr. DiPaolo as to why there was no appearance at the previous hearing scheduled on March 15, 2021. Mr. DiPaolo reports that he did not appear due to a calendaring error and apologizes to the court accordingly. Mr. DiPaolo then reports that his client remains incarcerated but regardless, has been able to have his client sign a Final Inventory and Appraisal which is now in the possession of the Probate Referee and intends to file with the court as soon as it is returned to him. Mr. DiPaolo also advises that he hopes to prepare and file an accounting but, believes that his client may waive the accounting.

After additional discussion, the court continues the Status on Close of Estate to July 19, 2021 at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Robert Woods; Bailiff: Deputy Tauscher. Not Reported. (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Apr-12-2021 Continued To Apr-26-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Mar-15-2021 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Mar-15-2021 Continued To Apr-12-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Attorney Thomas DiPaolo to appear on April 12, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why he failed to appear and why a final inventory and appraisal, and a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration have not been filed. Status on close of estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jan-11-2021 Continued To Mar-15-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Jan-11-2021 Continued To Mar-15-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Thomas Dipaolo appeared by zoom for Andrew Huey.

Mr. Dipaolo apologized to the Court stating that he overlooked the hearing, that he had not heard from his Client in over a year, that after not hearing from his Client and being unable to communicate with him he did some investigation, that he is 98% sure that he found the right person and that he believes his Client is incarcerated through November of this year. The Court noted that the order to appear that was mailed to the Client was returned as "return to sender". Mr. Dipaolo stated that the Decedent had a trust, that there is real estate in which she owned a 14% interest and asked the Court for permission to sign the inventory and appraisal where the declaration of the Representative is. Mr. Dipaolo also stated that he can get the inventory and appraisal to the Probate Referee and that he can the accounting. The Court stated that it will think about it, that it will continue this for two months for Counsel to tighten this up and that he is not comfortable with the request. Status on close of estate is continued to March 15, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The order to appear is off calendar.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Dec-21-2020 Continued To Jan-11-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: No appearance is made by any counsel, party, or interested person.

An Order to Appear shall issue to the Administrator, Andrew Huey, and his legal counsel, Thomas DiPaolo, Esq. to appear on January 11, 2021 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear at hearing on December 21, 2020, why the Inventory and Appraisal have not been filed, and why either a Report on the status of estate administration or Petition for Final Distribution has not been filed.

The matter is continued to January 11, 2021 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. Reporter: Not Reported. (D204)
